meaning: adj.指示的,有参考内容的,用作参考的
examples: There were no historical records of Homer, and no trustworthy biography of the man exists beyond a few self-referential hints embedded in the texts themselves.
Entering data and verifying referential integrity.
Self-referential jokes aside, Hendren also brought a great deal of light to the idiocy of social branding.
Earlier work had shown how assigning fuzzy values to self-referential sentences could give rise to mathematical chaos.
